name: AZ AKA
description: A fast-paced crisis management game where players react to incoming missile threats, balancing alerts, interceptions, and emergency handling under increasing pressure.

name: KERAH
description: A cooperative puzzle game where two players control siblings navigating an icy desert while avoiding threats and finding their way home.

name: From Myth To Games
description: A research seminar on how mythological creatures has been implemented into gameplay mechanics.

name: Spelunky - The Board Game
description: A board game adaptation of the classic Spelunky, translating digital exploration mechanics into a physical tabletop experience.

name: Fiddler Crab
description: An underwater arcade platformer where players smash shells, collect pearls, and grow stronger through repeated runs.

name: This Is War
description: A strategic card game built in Unity, focused on decision-making and war-themed mechanics.

name: Karakasa
description: A pixel-art game inspired by Japanese yokai folklore, where players control a mischievous umbrella spirit navigating haunted environments.

name: Suzi's Punishment
description: A quirky platformer where a young girl battles surreal enemies in a chaotic and darkly humorous world.

name: Floaty Space
description: A prototype puzzle experience built in Construct 3, exploring floating movement mechanics and spatial challenges.

name: Bubble To The Moon
description: A lighthearted racing game where players navigate a bubble through space, focusing on movement and timing.

name: WEFA! - Water Earth Fire & Air
description: A multiplayer arena combat game where players choose elemental powers and battle in fast-paced third-person action.

name: Maze Away
description: A puzzle game focused on navigation and pathfinding through increasingly complex maze structures.

name: The Crasher - "radical"
description: A social deduction game inspired by Spyfall, where players must identify hidden roles through interaction and deduction.

name: Jack And The Beanstalk - StoryTelling
description: An interactive storytelling project exploring narrative design through the classic Jack and the Beanstalk tale.

name: Go Box Go
description: A Unity learning project based on a racing course tutorial, focusing on physics and movement systems.

name: The Wizard Of Wave Island
description: An experimental game where players use focus and brainwave input mechanics to progress through challenges.
